subject: Update model_training scripts (srq1_*) to import PATHS.py bymonth/bychain constants
description: Update the 6 scripts currently at utility_scripts/scripts/srq1_baselines_stat.py, srq1_benchmark.py, srq1_benchmark_tuned.py, srq1_calibration.py, srq1_profiling.py, srq1_shap.py to replace any hardcoded '_03_engineered_dvhexclhd' or '_04_engineered_bychain' path strings with imports from PATHS.py: get_category_engineered_bymonth_dir() and get_category_engineered_bychain_dir() (added in task 3). These scripts are NOT being physically moved yet in this task -- only their internal path logic changes, in their CURRENT location under utility_scripts/scripts/. This is purely an import/path-logic edit, no behavior change. Depends on task 3 (helper functions must exist) and tasks 5-7 being resolved is not a hard blocker here since these specific scripts are unrelated to the open items. Verify: python3 -m py_compile on each of the 6 files; grep -n "_03_engineered_dvhexclhd\|_04_engineered_bychain" on each file should return nothing after the edit. Use the safe temp-script edit pattern per project hook rule -- never Edit/Write .py files directly. NOTE: srq1_figures.py was also found with hardcoded paths (not in original plan list) and updated in this pass alongside the 6 planned scripts.
activeForm: Updating model_training srq1_* scripts to use PATHS.py constants
